description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by dense rows of mature trees, creating a private and shaded environment. The structure features a complex, multi-hipped roof with several intersecting sections, and a prominent covered entryway supported by columns. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely wood or stucco, with multiple windows distributed across the facades. A paved driveway leads to a carport or garage area, and the front yard is landscaped with a symmetrical arrangement of trees. The overall layout is spacious, with the house set back from the street and ample green space on all sides. The design emphasizes privacy, comfort, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A single-story bungalow with a multi-hipped roof, surrounded by dense rows of trees and featuring a covered entryway, multiple windows, and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and symmetrical tree rows framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the carport or garage area, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the continuation of tree rows enclosing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's depth, roof complexity, and the extensive landscaping with trees along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
